args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn,
       ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax,
       ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
WITH trondheim_bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084, 7010675.560000021, 285864.4299986598, 7051059.450000035, 25833) AS geom
)
SELECT k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, ST_Area(k.omrade) AS area_m2
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k, trondheim_bbox b
WHERE ST_Intersects(k.omrade, b.geom);

-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
WITH trondheim_bbox AS (
  SELECT ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084, 7010675.560000021, 285864.4299986598, 7051059.450000035, 25833) AS geom
)
SELECT k.kartleggingsomradeid, k.kartleggingsomradenavn, ST_Area(k.omrade) AS area_m2
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade k, trondheim_bbox b
WHERE ST_Intersects(k.omrade, b.geom);

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and bounding box (xmin,ymin,xmax,ymax,srid,and kommunenummer)

2.description: select quick-clay polygons that intersect Trondheim bbox (reduced national layer)

3.description: select buildings in Trondheim (kommunenummer) with geometry

4.description: find buildings that intersect reduced quick-clay polygons

5.description: count distinct buildings intersecting quick-clay polygons

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmin, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymin, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS xmax, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS ymax, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, kartleggingsomradeid, kartleggingsomradenavn, kartleggingstatus, ST_Area(omrade) AS area_m2 FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.kartleggingsomrade o
WHERE o.omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084,7010675.56,285864.4299986598,7051059.45,25833)
AND ST_Intersects(o.omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(250339.82999591084,7010675.56,285864.4299986598,7051059.45,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001'

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
